---
title: "Oliver Reece"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: files/photo.jpeg 
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/ojreece
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/oliver-reece
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:oliver.j.reece66@gmail.com
---

## Welcome!

I am a fourth-year student athlete at Lawrence University. 
I expect to graduate on June 14th, 2026 with a B.A. Quantitative Economics and a minor in Data Science. 
I have competed on the NCAA DIII Men's Fencing Team for all four years. 

This website serves as a look into my professional life, with topics ranging from academic projects to work experience.
